global_description: A small, compact bird with a distinctive red face and black-and-white head pattern. The body is predominantly brown with a striking yellow wing bar. It has a conical beak and a forked tail. The plumage is smooth and glossy.

part_details.head: Red face with black and white stripes, small and rounded.
part_details.wings: Brown with a prominent yellow bar, smooth and elongated.
part_details.beak: Short, conical, and pale in color.
part_details.body: Compact, smooth brown plumage with glossy texture.

spatial_relations: The red face is centrally positioned on the head.
The yellow wing bar runs across the middle of the wings.
The conical beak protrudes from the front of the head.
The forked tail extends from the rear of the body.
